claim_text: Winter wheat development follows the BBCH scale: germination 0-9, leaf development 10-19, tillering 20-29, stem elongation 30-39, booting/heading 40-59, anthesis 60-69, grain filling/ripening 70-99.

value.raw_value_text: The main developmental stages of winter wheat from germination to ripening are depicted... Germination 0-9; Leaf development 10-19; Tillering 20-29; Stem elongation 30-39; Booting & heading 40-59; Anthesis 60-69; Grain filling & ripening 70-99
